description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, minimalist design and a predominantly white exterior. The structure features multiple large windows, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. There are two outdoor terrace areas, one with a pool and another with a shaded seating area, as well as a small green lawn with a palm tree at the front. The main entrance is accessible via a paved walkway leading to a double-door entryway. The house appears to have a single story with a partial second-level section, and the roof is mostly flat, suitable for rooftop activities. The overall layout is rectangular with some protruding sections, emphasizing geometric simplicity and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, outdoor terraces, a pool, and a minimalist white facade. Features include a green lawn, palm tree, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green lawn, palm tree, and two outdoor terraces, one with a pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shaded terrace area, large windows, and the paved walkway extending from the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, windowed facade and the pool area on the left, with minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool terrace, green lawn, and the rear section of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimal overhang, flanked by a small lawn and palm tree.
